desc: Keyboard accessibility is an essential part of the web accessibility spectrum and is typically defined as the ability to use all functionalities of a website sans reliance on a mouse. This can unprecedently empower users who cannot operate a mouse due to predicaments like motor disabilities or visual impairments.
title: Accessible Web Design: Understanding the Role of Keyboard Accessibility

desc: AChecker+ is a Web accessibility evalution tool designed to help Web content developers and Web application developers ensure their Web and PDF content is accessible to everyone regardless to the technology they may be using, or their abilities or disabilities.
title: AChecker+ Web Accessibility Checker | ACHECKS

desc: Accessibility resources free online from the international standards organization: W3C Web Accessibility Initiative (WAI).
title: Web Accessibility Evaluation Tools List | Web Accessibility Initiative (WAI) | W3C
